heading: Measures for the importation and exportation of rough diamonds
label: 3903 Measures for the importation and exportation of rough diamonds
notes: Effective DateFor effective date of this section, see , set out as a note under .section 15 of Pub. L. 108–19section 3901 of this title

Delegation of FunctionsFor assignment of functions of President under subsec. (b) of this section, see section 2 of Ex. Ord. No. 13312, , 68 F.R. 45151, set out as a note under .July 29, 2003section 3901 of this title

children.heading: Prohibition
children.label: a Prohibition
children.text: The President shall prohibit the importation into, or exportation from, the United States of any rough diamond, from whatever source, that has not been controlled through the Kimberley Process Certification Scheme.
the President determines and reports to the appropriate congressional committees that such country is taking effective steps to implement the Kimberley Process Certification Scheme; or

the President determines that the waiver is in the national interests of the United States, and reports such determination to the appropriate congressional committees, together with the reasons therefor.
